title: Pungent Dutch Cox Apple Skewers
description: A smoky and savory Dutch dish featuring cox apples, this recipe is a crowd pleaser with its balance of bitter and sweet flavors, and is halal friendly.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cox apple pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the apple pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and grill for 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and chopped parsley.
Brush the lemon parsley mixture onto the skewers during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the grill and serve hot.
